zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Sully於1260年出生在法國崔洛易特庫尼時，她的父親Henri II de SULLY37歲，母親Pétronille DE JOIGNY30歲。她於1280年與Adam De Melun IV結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1306年5月4日在法國享年46歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Sully于1260年出生在法国崔洛易特庫尼时，她的父亲Henri II de SULLY37岁，母亲Pétronille DE JOIGNY30岁。她于1280年与Adam De Melun IV结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1306年5月4日在法国享年46岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Sully was born in 1260, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, her father, Henri II de SULLY, was 37 and her mother, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, was 30. She married Adam De Melun IV in 1280. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 May 1306, in France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Sully est née en 1260, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Henri II de SULLY, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Adam De Melun IV en 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1306, à France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Sully 1260 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri II de SULLY 37 und ihre Mutter Pétronille DE JOIGNY 30. Sie hat 1280 Adam De Melun IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1306 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Sully è nata il nel 1260 nel Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Henri II de SULLY, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Adam De Melun IV nel 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1306, nel Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Sullyが1260年にフランスセントアロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Henri II de SULLYは37歳，母Pétronille DE JOIGNYは30歳であった。1280年にAdam De Melun IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1306年5月4日にフランスで46歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Sully(이)가 1260년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri II de SULLY(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Pétronille DE JOIGNY(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1280년 Adam De Melun IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1306년 5월 4일 프랑스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Sully nasceu em 1260, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Henri II de SULLY, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam De Melun IV em 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1306, em França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Sully родилась в 1260 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri II de SULLY было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Pétronille DE JOIGNY, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam De Melun IV в 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 мая 1306 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Sully nació en 1260, en Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Henri II de SULLY, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Adam De Melun IV en 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1306, en Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
